Floor Care & Restoration Services

Strip, seal, and refinish hard floors. Carpet extraction and encapsulation. Marble and stone restoration. VCT maintenance programs. GreenPoint Maintenance Services delivers floor care services across NY, NJ, CT, PA, and FL — backed by our proprietary JaniTrack real-time verification system.

Get an Instant Quote →Schedule Walkthrough
Floor Care

What's Included in Our Floor Care Services

Our floor care program is built around reliability, consistency, and verifiable results. Every engagement includes a customized scope of work and JaniTrack photo verification.

✓
VCT strip and wax
✓
Carpet shampooing and extraction
✓
Marble and stone polishing
✓
Concrete sealing
✓
Auto-scrubber programs
✓
Anti-slip treatment

Why Choose GreenPoint for Floor Care

As an MBE-certified commercial cleaning provider, GreenPoint brings accountability and transparency to every engagement. Our JaniTrack system gives you real-time GPS-verified photo proof that every task is completed to standard.

98%
Client Retention Rate
500+
Facilities Maintained
5
States Served
24/7
Emergency Response

Floor Care Service Areas

We provide floor care services across five states with dedicated regional teams. Select a location to learn about availability in your area.

✓
New York (NY): Serving Bronx, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island, Yonkers, New Rochelle, Mount Vernon, White Plains, Westchester and surrounding areas.
✓
New Jersey (NJ): Serving Newark, Jersey City, Paterson, Elizabeth, Hackensack, Fort Lee, Hoboken, Clifton, Passaic, East Orange and surrounding areas.
✓
Connecticut (CT): Serving Stamford, Bridgeport, New Haven, Hartford, Norwalk, Danbury, Waterbury, Greenwich and surrounding areas.
✓
Pennsylvania (PA): Serving Philadelphia, Allentown, Scranton, Bethlehem, Reading, King of Prussia, Norristown, Chester and surrounding areas.
✓
Florida (FL): Serving Orlando, Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Kissimmee, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Hialeah, Pembroke Pines and surrounding areas.
